Video.summary: Caroline has her purse stolen and asks Kristen for a loan. Stephanie tells Kristen she wants her to stay.
Video.title: The Bold And The Beautiful: Episode 27

Video.summary: Donna tries to make Rocco jealous by kissing Mark. Rocco retaliates by kissing Katie while Donna is watching.
